title: Salesforce Metadata Change History Tracking
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see how many changes have occurred to Salesforce objects since my last login, so that I can identify data model changes that may impact my migration or data dictionary.
description:
Track and display Salesforce metadata changes to help users stay aware of data model modifications made by developers.

### Important Change Types
1. Removal of fields
2. Adding new fields
3. Name or label changes on fields
4. Fields with formula updates

### Implementation
- Use Salesforce REST API `sObject Describe` with `If-Modified-Since` header to fetch only modified metadata
- New `ObjectChangeLog` table: ORGID, UserID, ObjectID, FieldID, ChangeType, ChangeDate, ChangeDetails, Reviewed (DateTime), ReviewedBy (UserID)
- Batch function runs against selected objects, accumulating changes across all objects
- Changes counted since user's last login

### UX Concept
- Alert icon on fields that have changed or been added
- Tooltip on hover with change details
- Click to acknowledge/clear the alert
- Column for alerts (possibly on far right)

### Technical Notes
- `If-Modified-Since` header format: `EEE, dd MMM yyyy HH:mm:ss z` (e.g., `Mon, 30 Nov 2020 08:34:54 MST`)
- Recommend using GMT timezone since user timezone is unknown
- Moment.js or PHP date formatting library for Salesforce's specific date format
acceptance_criteria: ObjectChangeLog table tracks field additions, removals, label changes, and formula updates
Batch function queries Salesforce REST API with If-Modified-Since header
Changes are counted since user's last DataTools Pro login
Change log records include object, field, change type, date, and details
Users can acknowledge/review changes to clear alerts
ux_changes: Alert icons on changed/added fields in the data dictionary. Tooltip with change details. Click to acknowledge.
middleware_changes: Batch function to query Salesforce sObject Describe API with If-Modified-Since header. Change detection and logging logic.
data_model_changes: New ObjectChangeLog table with ORGID, UserID, ObjectID, FieldID, ChangeType, ChangeDate, ChangeDetails, Reviewed, ReviewedBy columns.
api_changes: Uses Salesforce REST API sObject Describe with If-Modified-Since header for delta change detection.
implementation_notes: Initial testing showed If-Modified-Since header returning all metadata instead of only changes — required further investigation. Date format for the header is specific: 'EEE, dd MMM yyyy HH:mm:ss z'. Moment.js recommended for formatting. GMT timezone used since user timezone is unknown.
comment_summary: Ryan provided detailed specifications for the change log table and Salesforce API integration. Discussion about the If-Modified-Since header date format led to using Moment.js with GMT. Waqar reported the header was returning all metadata instead of only changes, requiring further investigation.
